_comment: CocoShaMem seed — the starting shared memories the walking skeleton loads. Each memory has an access 'category' (who may see it, enforced by the Bouncer against users.json) and content 'tags' (relevance/what it's about). JSON has no comments, so this '_comment' key is ignored.

memories.text: The deli on Carter Lane does great sandwiches.
Visitor parking is on Friar Street.
Q3 revenue for the London office was 4.2M.
The Acme supplier contract has a late-delivery penalty clause.
